synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-20943 Moderate: Oracle Linux 9 libssh security update
description:
[0.10.4-15]
- Bump spec to make the 9.7 NVR higher than the 9.6 one

[0.10.4-14]
- Fix CVE-2025-5318
  Resolves: RHEL-111732
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-20943

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-20943.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libssh-0.10.4-15.el9_7.i686.rpm
libssh-0.10.4-15.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
libssh-config-0.10.4-15.el9_7.noarch.rpm
libssh-devel-0.10.4-15.el9_7.i686.rpm
libssh-devel-0.10.4-15.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
libssh-0.10.4-15.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
libssh-config-0.10.4-15.el9_7.noarch.rpm
libssh-devel-0.10.4-15.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/libssh-0.10.4-15.el9_7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-5318




Description of changes:
[0.10.4-15]
- Bump spec to make the 9.7 NVR higher than the 9.6 one

[0.10.4-14]
- Fix CVE-2025-5318
  Resolves: RHEL-111732
